ab: Dangi mu ka Tusan, laqi seejiq balay ka hiya uri.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Tusan，他也是賽德克族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Tusan, and he is also an Seejiq child.

ab: Mseupu nami muyas patas alang Truku.
ch: 我們一起在德鹿谷部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Truku tribe.

ab: Qbahang nami snruan kari ka rudan sbiyaw kdjiyax, mkla nami balay rmngaw kari seejiq balay.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說賽德克語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the seejiq proficiently.

ab: Bowqax ni qthur ka yaku, llbu ni mliwang ka Tusan.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Tusan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Tusan is short and thin.

ab: Niqan bi bbiyax ka Tusan, smkuxul hiya kana ka seejiq.
ch: Tusan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Tusan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
